data.content: Shipment complete. Implementation of transitionToRetry() dispatch by resolveMemoryManagerType() is on main and pushed to origin/main. CI green (CI, Coverage Badge, Changesets all passing). Commits tagged: 7852e8ea608e (original dispatch), 69c52a7e8d0a (clarification). advanceRetryState() routes knots->nextKnot, beads->nextBeat.
